features.title: Psychological Stability Index (PSI)
features.description: A 0–100 score updated in real time across four zones: Stable (≥88), Caution (72–87), Warning (55–71), and Critical (<55) — so you can see when emotional pressure is building before it reaches a critical state.

features.title: Seven behavioral dimensions
features.description: Separate signals for revenge-style re-entry, stop manipulation, size outliers, hold-time collapse, holding deep losses, rule violations, and overtrading — each with its own weight you can tune.

features.title: Floating HUD + Dashboard
features.description: A lightweight overlay during trading plus a full Dashboard for session stats, timelines, history, profile baselines, and settings — all inside NinjaTrader 8.

features.title: Adaptive local baselines
features.description: Uses online statistics to adapt to your own trade timing and rhythm. Playback sessions do not pollute your live baseline.

features.title: No accounts, anonymous by design
features.description: No login, no personal accounts. Meridian never collects your name, broker credentials, account numbers, or funds. Your trades, baselines, and session history stay on your machine.

features.title: Native in NT8 — standalone for Tradovate & Ironbeam
features.description: Ships as a native NinjaTrader 8 add-on using account and execution events — works in live and Market Replay. Standalone Windows apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts are in early access. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.

features.title: Alerts you can hear and see
features.description: Visual and optional voice alerts when PSI or dimensions cross the thresholds you configure — plus automatic order blocking and optional auto-liquidation.
